daily-summary.prompt: Post the daily Bug-AutoPilot Triaged summary to the Teams Bug-Autopilot channel. Follow your workflow: (1) Fetch all work items from ADO query cf42325a-4ac0-4420-9d0e-c460ff45f5c2, (2) Analyze and classify the data, (3) Build the Teams message JSON using the exact template format, (4) Post to Teams via Graph API. Save the payload to Q:/src/tmp/poster-daily.json before posting. Use today's date in the subject line.
daily-summary.description: Queries ADO Bug-AutoPilot Triaged items and posts formatted summary to Teams Bug-Autopilot channel
